text: Aaj Doctor ne phir keh diya ki ye sab 'stress' hai, par main unhe kaise samjhaun ki ghar wale meri padhai rukwa kar rishte dhoond rahe hain. Agar maine career ki zid ki toh Papa ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi aur log kahenge ki beti haath se nikal gayi hai. Isliye main apni saari ambition andar daba kar sabki baatein maanti rehti hoon taaki ghar ki shanti bani rahe.

Doctor ne meri takleef ko halke mein liya, par unhe kya pata ki har din ek 'achi bahu' banne ki training aur restricted mobility mujhe andar se maar rahi hai. Main career ki baat nahi karti kyunki Mummy-Papa ne bohot sapne dekhe hain meri shaadi ko lekar aur main unka sar jhukne nahi de sakti. Unki khushi ke liye maine apne saare sapne ek kone mein rakh diye hain, bas yahi mera farz hai.

Mera dimaag phat raha hai par Doctor ne kaha ki ye bas stress hai, shayad wo nahi jante ki Career vs Career-less Bahu ki ladaai mere andar kitni gehri hai. Main ghar par kalesh nahi chahti isliye shaadi ke baad naukri chhodne ki baat par chup-chap haan bol deti hoon. Samaj mein hamare khandaan ka naam kharab na ho, isliye main apni sacchi feeling kisi ko nahi batati, bas muskurati rehti hoon.

Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par wo nahi dekhte ki ek beti hone ke naate mujh par ghar ki izzat ka kitna bojh hai. Mujhse ummeed ki ja rahi hai ki shaadi ke baad main career bhool kar bas chula-chauka sambhalun, aur main mana nahi kar sakti kyunki rishta tootne ka darr hai. Mummy kehti hain ki ladkiyon ko thoda jhukna padta hai, isliye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon taaki rishta bana rahe.

Mujhe ghabrahat hoti hai par Doctor ne kaha ki relax karo, unhe nahi pata ki mera career meri pehchaan hai jo mujhse cheeni ja rahi hai. Agar maine apna career chuna toh samaj kahega ki beti ne sanskar bhool diye aur maa-baap ki parvarish par sawal uthayenge. Isliye main sabka maan rakhne ke liye apni career ki khwaish ko maardeti hoon, kyunki parivaar se badhkar kuch nahi hai.
